title: Probability and Random Processes (Agentic Track)
description: Evidence-first stochastic curriculum covering probability foundations, random processes, convergence, martingales, and diffusion methods.
learning_objectives: Model probability spaces, random variables, and distributions rigorously.
Reason correctly about convergence modes, limit theorems, and stochastic processes.
Construct and critique theorem-level probabilistic arguments using claim-graph checks.
Progress from foundational probability to martingales and Brownian motion with formal prerequisites preserved.
